dependency_notes: Stories follow the spec's suggested implementation order. Story 01 (wire-format) introduces the SignedProfileEvent type seam consumed by 03/05/06. Story 02 (request types + memo store) introduces the ProfileRequestPayload and memo-CRUD seams consumed by 03/05/06. Story 03 (dispatcher + target reply) introduces the on-context handler seam consumed by 06. Story 04 (remove proactive republish) is independent of all others and can be parallelized. Story 05 (sweeps) introduces the requestProfilesIfStale seam consumed by pages/groups.tsx (in-story) and is verified by 07. Story 06 (relay-on-behalf) sits on top of 01+02+03. Story 07 (full E2E) lands the six-scenario spec and the test helpers; earlier stories ship with their own unit/integration tests so each is independently verifiable.
mock_resolution_plan: No temporary mocks introduced. Story 01 keeps backward compatibility for legacy unsigned ProfilePayload at the parser level — that is permanent backward-compat, not a mock — so legacy peers can interoperate during rollout. Story 07 introduces permanent E2E test fixtures (rumor-counter init script, IDB record-delete helper) under app/tests/e2e/helpers/.

stories.name: wire-format-signed-profile-event
stories.title: Wire-format upgrade — sign & verify embedded kind:0 in profile rumor content
stories.description: Reshape the existing kind 0 profile rumor's content to carry a stringified, fully signed Nostr kind:0 event (SignedProfileEvent). serialiseProfileUpdate becomes async and takes a signer; parseProfilePayload verifies the embedded sig via verifyEvent (nostr-tools) before merging; payloadToMemberProfile threads signedEvent through. Add SignedProfileEvent to app/src/types/index.ts and extend MemberProfile with optional signedEvent. Update every existing caller of serialiseProfileUpdate in MarmotContext.tsx to await and pass the in-context signer. Preserve MIP-03: the outer rumor stays unsigned. Preserve backward compat: a legacy flat ProfilePayload (no envelope) still merges, but with signedEvent: undefined.

includes: app/src/lib/marmot/profileSync.ts: sign in serialiseProfileUpdate (async + signer param); verify in parseProfilePayload; legacy fallback; signedEvent in payloadToMemberProfile
app/src/types/index.ts: export SignedProfileEvent; extend MemberProfile.signedEvent?
app/src/context/MarmotContext.tsx: await every serialiseProfileUpdate call site (onHistorySynced ~723, inviteByNpub ~930, publishProfileUpdate ~1029, plus the soon-removed ~710 if still present)
Persist signedEvent inside mergeMemberProfile (only the field-level extension; full memo store is story 02)
app/tests/unit/profileSync.test.ts (or similar): sign/verify round trip + legacy fallback parse
excludes: Profile-request memo IDB store and sweep helpers (story 02)
App-start sweep effect, group-open sweep, requestProfilesIfStale (story 05)

stories.notes: Foundational. Verifies cleanly against the existing groups-profile-update-propagation.spec.ts E2E without behavioural change. The largest call-site change in the epic is here; re-grep MarmotContext call sites before patching since later stories may shift line numbers.

stories.name: request-payload-and-memo-store
stories.title: Request rumor types, memo IDB store, pure dedupe helpers
stories.description: Create app/src/lib/marmot/profileRequestSync.ts (pure module): PROFILE_REQUEST_KIND=30, ProfileRequestPayload type, serialiseProfileRequest (random nonce), parseProfileRequestPayload, isProfileStale, shouldEmitRequest (truth-table predicate), pickBackoffMs, and the timing constants (PROFILE_STALENESS_MS, REQUEST_DEDUPE_MS, UNANSWERED_RETRY_MS, UNANSWERED_MAX_ATTEMPTS, RELAY_BACKOFF_MIN_MS, RELAY_BACKOFF_MAX_MS). Add the quizzl-profile-request-memos idb-keyval store and memo CRUD (loadProfileRequestMemo, saveProfileRequestMemo, recordRequestEmitted, recordRequestAnswered, clearProfileRequestMemos) — co-locate in groupStorage.ts (or a new profileRequestStorage.ts following the joinRequestStorage.ts template). Wire clearProfileRequestMemos into clearAllGroupData in groupStorage.ts. Adds no wire traffic and no React changes; ships only library code + unit tests.

includes: app/src/lib/marmot/profileRequestSync.ts (new pure module)
groupStorage.ts memo store + memo CRUD; mergeMemberProfile persists signedEvent; clearAllGroupData calls clearProfileRequestMemos
app/tests/unit/profileRequestSync.test.ts: isProfileStale boundaries, shouldEmitRequest truth table (fast-check parameterised), pickBackoffMs property test
excludes: Dispatcher arm and target-side immediate response (story 03)
leaveGroup wiring of clearProfileRequestMemos — that touchpoint lives in MarmotContext.tsx and is wired in story 03 (where the dispatcher and other context wiring lands)

stories.notes: Ships entirely as additive library code plus unit tests. Independent of story 01 — can land in parallel; only the mergeMemberProfile.signedEvent field-level persistence depends on story 01's type extension landing first (sequence 01→02 keeps that simple).

stories.name: request-dispatcher-and-target-reply
stories.title: PROFILE_REQUEST_KIND dispatcher arm + target-side immediate reply
stories.description: Wire the new request rumor into MarmotContext.tsx's onApplicationMessage dispatcher: parse incoming kind 30 payloads via parseProfileRequestPayload; on every observed request, call recordRequestEmitted so peer-issued requests dedupe across the group; when payload.targetPubkey === selfPubkeyHex, sign a fresh SignedProfileEvent from the local profile and send a profile rumor with no backoff via the existing buildRumor + sendRumorSafe pipeline. For non-self targets, delegate to handleIncomingProfileRequest (story 06 owns the relay implementation; this story imports it as a stub callable that returns void if not yet implemented — i.e. the call site is wired now, the relay logic lands in 06). Wire clearProfileRequestMemos into the leaveGroup useCallback (lines ~954-969 — re-grep). No sweep effect yet; emission paths land in story 05.

includes: MarmotContext.tsx: new PROFILE_REQUEST_KIND arm in onApplicationMessage dispatcher
Target-side immediate response: sign fresh SignedProfileEvent and emit via sendRumorSafe when payload.targetPubkey === selfPubkeyHex
Call recordRequestEmitted on every observed request (peer-issued or our own)
Verify embedded sig in PROFILE_RUMOR_KIND arm (drop forged before mergeMemberProfile)
leaveGroup useCallback: call clearProfileRequestMemos(groupId)

stories.notes: Depends on 01 (signing on the reply path) and 02 (parseProfileRequestPayload, recordRequestEmitted, PROFILE_REQUEST_KIND constant). Verifiable via a focused E2E that injects a fake request on a target and asserts a profile rumor is emitted; or via integration test simulating a single onApplicationMessage delivery.

stories.name: remove-proactive-on-member-add-republish
stories.title: Remove proactive republish on member-add
stories.description: Delete the if (currentMembers.length > prevMemberCount) block in MarmotContext.tsx (current lines 709-716; re-grep) so existing members no longer broadcast their profile every time a peer joins. Preserve onHistorySynced introduction (current 719-732) and inviteByNpub republish (current 929-936). With this change alone, newcomers receive only the inviter's profile via the inviter's republish, plus whatever survives MLS history replay; the request/sweep stories restore the rest.

includes: Delete the proactive on-member-add republish block in MarmotContext.tsx
Verify onHistorySynced introduction and inviteByNpub republish remain intact

stories.notes: Independent of every other story — could land first or last. Sequencing it after 03 keeps a working request mechanism in place when proactive republish disappears, so behaviour stays correct end-to-end. Existing groups-profile-update-propagation.spec.ts and groups-member-profiles.spec.ts E2Es should still pass post-04 only when stories 01-03 have already landed; otherwise the aged-history scenario regresses.

stories.name: stale-sweep-app-start-and-group-open
stories.title: App-start sweep effect + group-open sweep + requestProfilesIfStale
stories.description: Implement sweepStaleProfiles in profileRequestRunner.ts (new side-effecting module): walk every group's MLS member list, skip self, filter via isProfileStale, consult shouldEmitRequest, and for those passing both, call recordRequestEmitted and emit a PROFILE_REQUEST_KIND rumor through a sendRumor callback. Add a useEffect in MarmotContext that runs sweepStaleProfiles once when ready && groups.length > 0 && pubkeyHex first becomes truthy. Expose requestProfilesIfStale(groupId) on the context value (single-group variant of the sweep). Update GroupDetailView in pages/groups.tsx route-enter useEffect to call requestProfilesIfStale(id) after setGroup(found).

includes: app/src/lib/marmot/profileRequestRunner.ts: sweepStaleProfiles export (and stub exports for handleIncomingProfileRequest / notifyProfileObserved that story 06 fills in — or land minimal no-op shims here)
MarmotContext: app-start sweep useEffect (gated on ready && groups.length > 0 && pubkeyHex)
MarmotContext: requestProfilesIfStale(groupId) on context value
pages/groups.tsx GroupDetailView: call requestProfilesIfStale(id) inside the existing route-enter useEffect

stories.notes: Depends on 01 (SignedProfileEvent for the cached profile), 02 (memo store, sync helpers), and 03 (dispatcher arm so a target replies when a sweep emits a request).

stories.name: relay-on-behalf-with-backoff
stories.title: Peer relay-on-behalf with 5-30s backoff and observation cancellation
stories.description: Fill in handleIncomingProfileRequest and notifyProfileObserved in profileRequestRunner.ts. handleIncomingProfileRequest({ groupId, payload, now, sendRumor }): when targetPubkey is not self, load cached MemberProfile; if signedEvent is present and (sinceUpdatedAt is absent OR cached.updatedAt > sinceUpdatedAt), schedule setTimeout(pickBackoffMs()) keyed by (groupId, targetPubkey) in a module-level Map; on fire, invoke sendRumor with the cached signedEvent verbatim wrapped in a PROFILE_RUMOR_KIND rumor. notifyProfileObserved cancels any pending timer for (groupId, targetPubkey) when observedUpdatedAt is at least as fresh as scheduled. Wire MarmotContext's PROFILE_RUMOR_KIND arm to call notifyProfileObserved on every verified incoming profile.

includes: profileRequestRunner.ts: handleIncomingProfileRequest, notifyProfileObserved, pending-relay timer Map keyed by (groupId, targetPubkey)
MarmotContext: connect handleIncomingProfileRequest into the dispatcher arm landed in story 03 (replace stub)
MarmotContext: PROFILE_RUMOR_KIND arm calls notifyProfileObserved after successful merge

stories.notes: Highest-complexity story — concurrency-sensitive (timer keying, cancellation race). Vitest with fake timers is the right shape for the unit tests; the full E2E with target-offline lives in story 07. Depends on 01 (signedEvent on MemberProfile), 02 (sync helpers), 03 (dispatcher arm wired).

stories.name: e2e-coverage-six-scenarios
stories.title: End-to-end Playwright spec — six verification scenarios + helpers
stories.description: Land app/tests/e2e/groups-profile-request.spec.ts modelled on groups-profile-update-propagation.spec.ts and groups-member-profiles.spec.ts. Cover all six spec scenarios: aged-history backfill (target online), periodic refresh (8d via page.clock.fastForward), per-peer dedupe (rumor counter from helper), relay-on-behalf with target offline (page.context().setOffline), retry state machine (1h / 7d / 3-attempt boundaries via clock control), forged-sig rejection (inject a kind:0 with mismatched sig and assert merge is rejected). Ship the missing E2E helpers under app/tests/e2e/helpers/: installRumorCounter / getRumorCount (page.addInitScript hooking onApplicationMessage and sendApplicationRumor), deleteIdbRecord(page, dbName, storeName, key).

includes: app/tests/e2e/groups-profile-request.spec.ts
app/tests/e2e/helpers/rumor-counter.ts
app/tests/e2e/helpers/idb-record.ts (or co-located inside existing clear-state.ts)
excludes: Production code changes (the implementation lives in stories 01-06)

test_fixtures.description: Rumor-counter init script that monkey-patches marmot-ts onApplicationMessage and sendApplicationRumor on window load to bump window.__rumorCounters. Permanent because counter-style observability is broadly useful for future rumor-related E2Es (chat, score, polls).
test_fixtures.interface: installRumorCounter(page, kinds: number[]): Promise<void>; getRumorCount(page, kind: number, direction: 'in' | 'out'): Promise<number>
test_fixtures.reason: Permanent test infrastructure under app/tests/e2e/helpers — applies beyond this epic.

test_fixtures.description: Targeted IDB record-delete helper that opens a named IndexedDB and deletes a single keyed entry, leaving other state intact.
test_fixtures.interface: deleteIdbRecord(page, dbName: string, storeName: string, key: string): Promise<void>
test_fixtures.reason: Permanent test infrastructure — parallels existing clear-state.ts; reusable for any IDB-backed rumor sync test.

stories.notes: Depends on 01-06. The retry-state-machine scenario uses Playwright 1.45+'s page.clock.install / fastForward; the project is on 1.58 so this is native. Forged-sig rejection requires injecting a SignedProfileEvent through window.__forgedProfileInject or a similar test-only hook — design the seam during the story's architect step.
